title: SalahDin Rezk Blog
description: Essays and technical writing from SalahDin Rezk.

items.title: Leaving Social Media for Good
items.content_text: In my humble opinion, the way modern social media is being used can't be more toxic. We don't really engage, have fun, or learn. You waste hours of your life doing nothing but scroll through an endless stream of meaningless content. Human lives should be wasted on nothing like this. I won't be talking about why to leave, you are here because you already want to leave.
